recentTweets.text: While we’re on the topic of declassifying intelligence assessments…. Trump’s IC still hasn’t released the unclassified version of the IC assessment of the 2024 election- something released within months of the 2020 and 2022 federal elections. Why won’t he? What’s the hold up?

Virginia, much of our Commonwealth is experiencing hazy skies and poor air quality today… and it could last all the way through the weekend.

Those with heart disease, lung disease, asthma, and other complicating health issues should stay indoors. Everyone should limit strenuous
RT @Acyn: Warner on CBS: I was embarrassed that the president went before our country and networks like yours carried this as news as oppos…
RT @KDilanianMSNOW: Sen. Mark Warner just told our @MSNow audience that everything Trump raised tonight had been examined by the Senate int…
RT @TVietor08: Trump released documents that confirm Russia tried to interfere in the 2020 election to hurt Biden. It says Russia tried to…
That was an embarrassing speech with no new info – just lies and rehashed conspiracies. It’s incumbent on ALL of us not to treat that like real news. https://t.co/6V1Dnq3VjR

Tonight, Donald Trump made one thing abundantly clear: He’s going to do everything he can to interfere in our free and fair elections. 

This is the time for all of us to stand together and fight back. https://t.co/cov9AnNodF
RT @willsommer: Trump's big document release tonight, supposedly meant to prove China stole the 2020 election, includes this classified int…

These are accusations against his OWN appointees from his first term… several of whom he reappointed. 

Is he suggesting his own officials should be fired or arrested?
Isn’t it weird that Trump’s speech never mentioned Russia – probably the single biggest perpetrator of election influence?
RT @atrupar: Warner: "As an American, I'm embarrassed ... we gotta decide whether we can keep our republic. And if we simply blow this off…

It’s pretty laughable to watch Trump try and pretend accessing the voter file is the same thing as election interference. 

ANY statewide candidate will tell you that information is publicly available to purchase – it’s not some huge breach.
Trump uses his primetime address to claim mail-in ballots are “inherently corrupt”… while he’s used them time and time again. https://t.co/TnKGbjZv0j

Well folks, as expected, Trump revealed essentially nothing new.

His speech was just lies & long-debunked conspiracies about the 2020 election.

This is all just a prelude to interfere in our midterms — don’t fall for it.

Trump’s shocking “bombshells” about China are totally bogus. 

The fact is our intelligence agencies unanimously agreed that China did not even try to change a single vote in the 2020 election. A single concurring opinion suggested China may have tried to sway voters’ opinions…

Whatever false claims Trump makes tonight, remember the facts: he’s been publicly saying for months that he wants to interfere in our elections.

Tonight’s speech is designed to help him justify that. Do not fall for it.
While this forever war rages, you continue to foot the bill. https://t.co/TO54Wt46Kc
RT @SenOssoff: Sen. Ossoff: Tonight, Donald Trump, the world's most famous sore loser, will deliver a prime time presidential sour grapes a…

For anyone interested in doing their own research before Trump’s speech tonight… you can read the full declassified report on foreign threats to the 2020 election here. There was NO foreign interference in the 2020 election.
https://t.co/lUgxJiLn7O
RT @SenSchumer: Trump’s election speech tonight is not about the 2020 election—it is a threat against the election he's afraid to lose in N…

We’ve known for years that foreign governments have attempted to influence our elections – many supporting President Trump. 
But the fact is, the IC resoundingly found that no foreign governments successfully interfered in the 2020 election. https://t.co/M9tzKJIkwS

Tonight is a critical moment for our democracy.

Trump is going to use his address to lay the groundwork to interfere in our elections.

Follow the facts. Don’t let him mislead you. Our elections are secure and freely administered.
Russ Vought has terrorized and traumatized thousands of government workers. Today, I asked him to answer for that. https://t.co/nfYz7Phnzb

RT @atrupar: WARNER: You said you wanted to 'traumatize the federal workforce.' Give yourself a grade on how much trauma you've brought.

V…
RT @BulwarkOnline: Sen Warner: “You said in your writings that you wanted to traumatize the federal workforce…Give yourself a grade on how…
Tonight, Trump lays the groundwork to try and interfere in our midterms. Follow the facts. Don’t believe him when he lies. https://t.co/THABhp6rXm
Trump’s big elections “reveal” is coming tomorrow. Here’s what you need to know. https://t.co/ncvtfpsVex

Our elections are too important to mess with.

But tomorrow, Trump is going to try and create a pretext for massive interference.

Buckle up. Follow the facts. Don’t let him stoke hysterics about an election that was audited, investigated, and fair.
At the pump, at the grocery store, on everything you buy…. prices are skyocketing because of Trump’s war of choice. https://t.co/UidhKX1pXV

Tomorrow night, Trump is going to use a primetime address to stoke misleading claims about our elections in order to justify interfering in our midterms.

It’s on all of us to follow the facts and not accept his constant stream of misdirections and lies.

Keeping intelligence free of political influence has life or death consequences. 

We must protect the integrity of our Intel Community from a president that’s hellbent on interfering. https://t.co/Mebl2JI4rF
Big hearing this morning in the Intelligence Committee — here’s what I’m thinking about as I question Jay Clayton. https://t.co/2T94r2e3vb

100,000 Virginians have lost their health care since Trump & Republicans purposefully stripped away tax credits from millions across the country.

We will never give up on trying to restore them. I will keep working to get us to universal coverage.

Last year, RFK Jr’s CDC cut back on monitoring cyclospora amid drastic funding cuts – now thousands of Americans are experiencing the horrific effects of this parasite.

This administration’s attacks on public health make us less safe and less healthy.

Do not fall for it.

Trump has been laying the groundwork to justify massive interference in our midterms. It’s coming on Thursday. Don’t let him fool you.
Read the full op-ed here: https://t.co/LB5oBWYMZr

Months ago, I published an op-ed laying out Trump’s intentions to interfere in our elections.

This week, I think he’s preparing to take his biggest step yet.

I fear his speech on Thursday is meant to mislead Americans and lay the groundwork for election interference. Don't take https://t.co/px66MNUGWX

For months, I’ve been warning about Trump’s obsession with losing the 2020 election and his threats to “take over” voting. Now, it looks like he’s going to claim he found “fraud” that justifies his interference in the midterms. Don’t buy into his BS! https://t.co/ldfwHbJYBr

We need a full and transparent investigation into the shooting in Biddeford.

ICE agents cannot continue to kill with impunity. We need more guardrails now.

The president promised no new wars.
 
Instead, he's dragging the American people deeper into his reckless war of choice.
 
Enough is enough.

For months, I’ve been warning that Trump might try finding “fraud” from the 2020 election in order to justify heavy interference in our midterms.

It looks like that “announcement” could be coming this Thursday. 

Don’t believe the narrative he’s trying to push.

After Republicans passed their budget megabill last summer and let enhanced ACA subsidies expire, thousands of Virginians have lost or are at risk of losing their health coverage.

The damage is already being felt. Providers are warning of growing financial strain, and eight
NEW: The Trump family has found another way to use the presidency to line their pockets. https://t.co/Iqhn3bXySO

Trump has claimed that his war of choice is nearly over more than 30 times.

Yet prices at the pump are rising, the Strait of Hormuz is closed, the U.S. and Iran are trading airstrikes, and a nuclear deal looks unlikely.
Read more here: https://t.co/Kv6a5YpS1o

The Trump administration is steering billions of dollars toward defense technologies. At the same time, the president’s sons are investing in the companies that stand to benefit.

America's defense priorities should be driven by our national security, not the Trump family's

I was heartbroken to learn of the sudden passing of my friend and colleague, Senator Lindsey Graham.

Lindsey and I disagreed on plenty over the years, but I never doubted his love for this country or his commitment to serving it. He was a fierce advocate for the causes he

Last night, the ROAD to Housing Act became law – even though Trump refused to sign it “in protest.”
 
While his obstruction is still mystifying, this is a real, tangible bipartisan win for lowering costs. I am proud to have helped write it.

You can hear more about how this law will help lower your costs here:
https://t.co/VdiwntfYwn

Kash Patel’s FBI is reassigning hundreds of analysts to investigate kooky conspiracy theories about the 2020 election… when they should be focused on fighting serious crimes. How does that make us safer?
Trump is ramping up his attacks on our elections. We must stop him. https://t.co/pYfLD8Ain3

Reports that the White House has dismissed the remaining members of the Election Assistance Commission — all of whom were unanimously confirmed by the Senate, including a commissioner appointed by President Trump himself — should concern every American, regardless of party,
Welcome home, USS Nimitz! I wish her 3,000 sailors and their families the very best as they settle into Naval Station Norfolk. Thank you all for your service and commitment to the nation.

Inflation is increasing by 3.2%. Oil prices and energy costs are going up, too.

That's more money coming out of your pocket, and Donald Trump doesn't seem to care.
The only thing Trump has achieved in this forever war is raising your costs.

Why is the FBI ordering hundreds of analysts to investigate completely debunked claims about the 2020 election?

I’m demanding answers on why YOUR tax dollars are being misused for this fool’s errand… instead of fighting serious crime. https://t.co/dP5BdLYQ1i
Read more here: https://t.co/RbpAq2Dli0

We are short millions of homes. The average age of a first-time homebuyer is now 41 years old. Trump could start changing that TODAY by signing our bipartisan housing law… instead, he calls it a “big yawn.”

Trump has declared the ceasefire “over” and we’re back to striking Iran. 

We must stop this stupid, costly war of choice. 

We will keep fighting to end it in Congress. https://t.co/SoMYM9vZ50

Trump refuses to sign a law to make housing more affordable while he stokes his cost-spiking forever war. 

While you struggle to get ahead, he’s leveraged the presidency to rake in $2.2 billion in the last two years alone.

Embarrassing and dangerous. Why are we alienating our allies further while we already wade through a costly forever war? https://t.co/xpibqFPVUI

Trump is now declaring the ceasefire “over”… further prolonging this painful, costly war.

I’m still fighting in Congress to rein in his war powers and bring this to an end.

Americans are sick and tired of these forever wars.
Read more about the projects being funded here: https://t.co/Rk9wSOZ5aC

BIG NEWS: Virginia is getting more than $76 million in federal funding for transportation projects that will expand passenger rail, reduce traffic congestion, and strengthen our infrastructure!

I’m proud to help deliver investments that make it easier for Virginians to get where

Trump has raked in $2.2 BILLION for himself since the start of his presidency.

Grocery prices are up.

Rents are up.

Gas prices are up.
Trump could do the bare minimum TODAY and sign the enormously bipartisan housing bill that would lower costs for all. Why won’t he?

Trump is now charging taxpayers an extra $875,000 just to speed up construction of his private White House helipad – adding to the hundreds of millions he’s spent on crazy vanity projects that only serve himself.

Incremental changes to who gets health care and who doesn’t have left millions of Americans in constant limbo and kept prices high.
 
The U.S. needs to move towards universal health care.
Trump has used the presidency to rake in $2.2 BILLION for himself. This is the most corrupt administration in American history. https://t.co/UzKzZG1Jk5

After years of progress and generations of healthier kids, 2025 and 2026 have seen skyrocketing numbers of measles cases – and there’s no sign they’re letting up soon. 
 
Trump and RFK Jr. have turned the clocks back and needlessly endangered countless kids.

A year ago, Trump signed a law that rips health care away from millions and risks shuttering 300 hospitals… to fund a tax cut for the wealthiest. It’s the most dangerous law in a generation, but we’re fighting daily to pick up the pieces and get relief to hardworking Americans.

Happy Fourth of July! Today, we celebrate 250 years of the greatest country in the world. We will continue to fight to protect our founding values – life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for all Americans.
Virginia, we’re facing extreme heat through this holiday weekend. Please celebrate safely, remain vigilant for signs of heat stroke, and check in on elderly neighbors, who can be at very high risk.
Trump is trying to interfere in our elections. Every week in the Senate, I am doing everything I can to stop it. https://t.co/qexTGsazRX
Read more here: https://t.co/KhnSJggDS8
Trump is more focused on botching the Reflecting Pool and building his big, ugly ballroom than he is on lowering costs for the American people.

Wrapping up my day in Clintwood at the Dickenson Community Hospital talking about the urgent need to protect rural health care. We need serious action to ensure rural clinics can continue to provide care as Trump’s Medicaid cuts wreak havoc across the country. https://t.co/uL9FA9jtnp

Just had a great visit with folks from Dickenson and Buchanan counties… and I came with big money! Good to drop off funding for a new fire truck and affordable housing across the region. I’ll keep bringing big federal dollars to Southwest Virginia. https://t.co/dk9QCmxvMr

Trump and Republicans handed more than $200 billion to immigration enforcement agencies.

How are they using your taxpayer funds? They’re arresting nuns and targeting people who speak out against them.

That’s not public safety. That’s an abuse of power.
While Americans are battling rising inflation, higher gas prices, health care cuts, and an ongoing housing crisis, Trump is using the chaos he created to pocket billions.

Trump appointed Bill Pulte – who doesn’t even have a security clearance – to serve as Acting DNI.

Then he told him to “declassify whatever you want.”

Time and time again, this administration shows a reckless disregard for our national security.

I came to Damascus in the days just after Helene and was heartbroken by the damage to the Creeper Trail — a natural treasure and an economic driver for the region. I successfully secured a big aid package to rebuild it, and yesterday I got to see some of the reconstruction work. https://t.co/9PuB6BE1bl

Spent a great afternoon in Independence, where I met with farmers and producers from across the region to discuss the Farm Bill, Helene relief, and more. I’m bringing all these priorities back to Washington and continuing to fight for a bipartisan Farm Bill. https://t.co/fUKQnoD6OC

Just stopped by Vaughan Bassett Furniture in Galax — an incredible business that’s been devoted to manufacturing right here in Virginia for generations. It was great to hear from folks across the community about what they need from Washington. https://t.co/TXTPP59r6q

Since Trump started his war of choice, American families have paid an extra $1,000 on fuel, food, and more.

What will it take for the president to focus on lowering costs?

Trump’s all for using the presidency to enrich his family and allies.

But landmark legislation that will help Americans out of this housing crisis – he calls a “big yawn.”

A great morning in Patrick County dropping off $785,000 for Connect Health & Wellness to continue expanding their incredible health care services. 

As rural health care providers deal with painful funding cuts, I’m proud to fight every day to get them all the support I can. https://t.co/fsSDbVm2k4

The Supreme Court struck down Trump’s illegal attempt to end birthright citizenship. While it’s unlikely that this fight is over, today’s decision affirms our Constitution and celebrates our nation’s enduring ideal: “out of many, one.” https://t.co/VurawDRbie
The 14th amendment clearly states that individuals born in the U.S. are citizens, and today the Supreme Court reaffirmed that by striking down Trump’s illegal executive order.

Yesterday, we celebrated a huge investment by Hitachi that will create hundreds of high-paying jobs in South Boston — a win so exciting I wanted to get behind the camera and capture it myself. 

Here’s my photo… how’d I do? https://t.co/1w31vXveUV

It was great to be in Danville yesterday to convene a discussion about how we can continue to spur economic growth & tour some of the work happening at the Institute for Advanced Learning and Research. I will always fight to bring jobs & investments home to Southside Virginia. https://t.co/zZ70IO0hhF

Had a wonderful morning in South Boston celebrating a $450+ million investment by Hitachi — creating over 800 high-paying local jobs. 

I’m proud to have played a small role in getting us here today and continuing to bring home investments for Southside Virginia. https://t.co/onlMaBviH6
JD Vance said it himself: The Trump administration makes Watergate look like no big deal. https://t.co/iZssgPfRaP
Unless it’s about lining his pockets, settling political scores, or disenfranchising voters, Trump doesn’t care at all.

The average age of a first-time homebuyer is now 40 – a decade older than it was in 2010.

That’s a crisis. Yet Trump still refuses to do the bare minimum and sign the overwhelmingly bipartisan law that could help lower housing costs.
$16 million of your tax dollars at work. https://t.co/Kpq2i8HsiF
Your prices are higher because of Trump’s disastrous leadership. https://t.co/BbmyfeCEgL
This is the most corrupt administration in American history. https://t.co/oakTBA7dna

Trump has spent $16 million on a failed renovation of the Reflecting Pool and now plans to redrain it and start again. 

Your tax dollars are being flushed down the toilet while millions of Americans struggle with rampant inflation.
